description: Two new platforms (Grok Build, Kimi Code), Codex native subagent dispatch, machine-readable platform/task state, and the Pi shared-skills migration to `.agents/skills/`.
changelog:
**Enhancements:**
- feat(cli): add Grok Build platform support — `trellis init --grok` (#433)
- feat(cli): add Kimi Code platform support — `trellis init --kimi` (#452)
- feat(zcode): hooks + mem session support (#411)
- feat(codex): enable native subagent dispatch (#445)
- feat(cli): `trellis platforms --json` machine-readable platform state (#396)
- feat(scripts): `task.py list/current --json` output (#395)
- feat(channel): `--sandbox` override for Codex workers (#413)
- feat(scripts): stamp base_branch from repo default + `--base-branch` override (#399)

**Bug Fixes:**
- fix(pi): write shared skills to `.agents/skills/` instead of a private `.pi/skills/` root (#447)
- fix(update): rename-dir merge must not clobber canonical target with stale source bytes (#447)
- fix(update): preserve reintroduced templates (#425)
- fix(cli): drop preferOffline for registry template downloads (#383)
- fix(omp): bridge session context into bash env (#424)
- fix(configurators): quote YAML frontmatter descriptions to survive embedded colons (#437)
- fix(hooks): adapt SessionStart acknowledgment language (#439)
- fix(brainstorm): require explicit planning approval before task creation (#416)
- fix(codex): pin agents.max_depth=1 in project config.toml (#445)
- fix: 0.6.7 fleet review batch — task boundary, atomic write, activation diagnostics, OpenCode start.md (#438)

migrations.description: Pi Agent: move installed skills from the private `.pi/skills/` root to the shared `.agents/skills/` root also used by Codex and Gemini CLI.
migrations.reason: Pi already discovers `.agents/skills/` natively, so keeping a separate `.pi/skills/` copy of the same Trellis skills caused Pi to see the same skill twice (once from each root) when Codex or Gemini was also installed (#447).

notes: Pi Agent users: skills moved from .pi/skills/ to the shared .agents/skills/ root. Run `trellis update --migrate` to move existing installs (optional but recommended).
